name: com.ryanellisdale.ability-system
description: The Tactics Ability System Package is a lightweight Unity framework that provides modular, data‑driven building blocks for turn‑based tactics gameplay. It replaces tightly coupled MonoBehaviour logic with clean, composable ScriptableObject systems for abilities, effects, statuses, buffs, and resource costs. The goal is to make tactics projects more flexible, scalable, and easier to extend through a clear, backend‑only architecture that integrates smoothly with any grid, unit, or turn system. Built using the modular architecture package available at: https://github.com/RyanEllisDale/ModularArchitecture

samples.description: Small little visual scene to show how buffs functions when added, removed and how turn progression impacts them
A tiny log based status scene with turn control buttons and status application buttons, used to demonstrate basic status structure.
Small scene to show the evaluation and usage of supplies as data assets. ( used for resources like mana / gold )
